ticket.title: INTEGRATE EXTERNAL USER API FOR AUTHENTICATION (USER MANAGEMENT)

test_cases.description: Verify user can log in using existing external API credentials without needing to create a separate Ezquote account.
test_cases.expected_result: User successfully logs in using external API credentials; no local Ezquote account creation is required.

test_cases.description: Verify user's role (Admin/Agent) is correctly assigned based on the external API response after login.
test_cases.expected_result: Correct role-based view (Admin or Agent) loads immediately after login, matching the role returned by the API.

test_cases.description: Verify failed login with invalid credentials shows an appropriate, clear error message.
test_cases.expected_result: A specific 'invalid credentials' error is shown; user is not logged in.

test_cases.description: Verify login behavior when the external API is unavailable or times out.
test_cases.expected_result: A clear 'service unavailable' message is shown; the app does not silently fail or hang.

test_cases.description: Verify branch selection and session/logout behavior continue to work correctly after login via the external API.
test_cases.expected_result: Branch dropdown, session persistence, and sign-out all function normally post-integration.
